name: Broccoli with Rigatoni
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat the olive oil and soy margarine over medium heat. Gently brown the minced garlic, being careful not to burn it.
2. Add the broccoli florets to the skillet and stir gently until they are evenly coated with the oil and margarine. Cook for about 5 minutes, or until the broccoli begins to soften.
3. Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a simmer. Cover and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the broccoli is tender but still has some bite (al dente).
4. Add half of the chopped fresh basil and the cooked rigatoni to the skillet. Stir gently to combine.
5. Transfer the pasta and broccoli mixture to a hot serving dish. Sprinkle with the remaining fresh basil, chopped parsley, and pepper to taste. Serve immediately.
